TextView.android:text: This app demonstrates the winner's solution of LPCVC 2026 Track 1: Image-to-Text Retrieval. The goal of this track is to retrieve the most relevant text descriptions for a given image from a candidate pool.\nThe first place winner of this challenge was EfficientAI, achieving an accuracy score of 0.6270 on our evaluation dataset.

• Texts are tokenized using CLIP Tokenizer prior to app deployment.
• Upon APP startup, all text embeddings are calculated.
• User Selects an image for retrieval.
• Run Model button is pressed
• Image embeddings are calculated.
• Cosine similarity scores of image and text embeddings are calculated.
• Ranked texts are listed.
